designSystem.style: Retro-analog with aged parchment textures, dashed borders, map coordinate typography, vintage stamp motifs, and ochre-moss-charcoal palette — nostalgic, serene, curated discovery

navigation: gesture-based swipe with vintage instrument panel bottom nav and progress dot indicators
keyFeatures: Geo-Anchored Rituals with horizontal scroll discovery
Local Lore stacked horizontal scroll sections
Memory Shard collection with rarity system and detail modal
Wellness Journey with SVG progress ring and achievement badges
Light/Dark theme toggle on all screens
